## Type

- [ ] New pack

## For New Packs

- [ ] `permit0 pack validate` passes
- [ ] `permit0 pack test` passes
- [ ] At least 3 fixture test cases
- [ ] README.md included
- [ ] Normalizer IDs are unique

## Test Plan

<!-- How were these changes tested? -->

- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` clean
